title: Peranema foeniculacea
taxonomy: Peranema foeniculacea is a species of green algae that belongs to the class Chlorophyceae. It is part of the phylum Chlorophyta and the kingdom Plantae, although it does not contain chlorophyll b. The class Chlorophyceae is further divided into several orders, and Peranema foeniculacea is a member of the order Chlorococcales. This species is known for its ability to form symbiotic relationships with other organisms. Peranema foeniculacea is also a heterotrophic organism, obtaining its nutrients through phagocytosis rather than photosynthesis.
